text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in late June 2010. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2010/625106.html The line was based on the Petit Eva: Evangelion@School series. There are 8 regular keychains in the line. It includes one 4-koma manga strip out of three different ones.
